news.paragraph: The Nasdaq 100, tracked by QQQ, saw mixed action as the broader market turned upward, with some AI-related stocks like Nvidia recovering from earlier losses while others such as Intuit experienced significant drops. The index's performance reflects the volatility within the tech sector, particularly among growth-oriented companies. Traders should monitor the performance of key AI components for directional cues.

headlines.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500 Turn Up As Nvidia Cuts Losses; Intuit Craters, AI Players Jam (Live Coverage)

examples.body: $QQQ man, people just make up ANYTHING in this board 😂. This is hilarious. If you believe anything anyone posts here, you should close your brokerage accounts.
$QQQ The only Certainty out of this administration is Uncertainty.
$QQQ amazing how this can be manipulated when your trading system only holds it for a microsecond.
$QQQ these idiots buy every dip lol
$QQQ if inflation comes down then all the companies basing future earnings on today’s prices are going to have a problem beating or even coming close to even
